setup.note: Official Canva remote MCP server. Canva docs note that design generation can need a 60 second timeout. Canva also requires redirect URI allowlisting for new integrations and each user authenticates individually. If DCR is unavailable, Canva documents manual registration at https://mcp.canva.com/register. References: https://www.canva.dev/docs/mcp/ and https://www.canva.dev/docs/mcp/troubleshooting/
